ques: Find the latest model of the iPhone and compare the price and screen size between the pro and pro max.
answer: The latest iPhone is the iPhone 17 (Sep 2025). Comparing the two Pro models — iPhone 17 Pro: 6.3-inch display, from $1,099; iPhone 17 Pro Max: 6.9-inch display, from $1,199. The Pro Max is $100 more and has a 0.6-inch larger screen.
